# Our mission is to redefine how we age

## Who we are

Timeline is a Swiss-born longevity brand founded by scientists, doctors, and innovators on a mission to extend healthspan through clinically proven science. At the core is Mitopure®, our proprietary Urolithin A, shown to improve mitochondrial function—foundational for living longer and healthier.  
  
We’re not built on hype, but on human clinical evidence—with over 80 patents and five gold-standard clinical trials. Timeline is setting a new standard in longevity.

* ## 18

  Years of research

  In collaboration with the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology de Lausanne (EPFL)
* ## 25

  Human clinical trials

  Completed and ongoing gold-standard clinical trials on nutrition and skincare involving over 900 participants
* ## 500⁺

  Scientists have extensively explored Urolithin A’s effectiveness on health and patented the bioactive into Mitopure®
* ## 80

  Patents

  Our proprietary ingredient Mitopure® is protected under 80 patents

“What makes Timeline so unique compared to all the other companies out there is really our deep dedication to science that we employ in the development of all of our products.”

##### Chris Rinsch, PhD

Co-founder & President

## Good things take time

##### 2025

news

## [Named a Top 40 Global Finalist in the $101M XPRIZE Healthspan Competition, recognizing Timeline as a world leader in clinically proven longevity interventions.](https://www.xprize.org/prizes/healthspan)

##### 2024

research

## Over 80 global patents granted for Urolithin A and Mitopure®.

##### 2023

product

## Topical skincare line powered by Mitopure® launched with proven benefits for firmness and radiance.

##### 2022

research

## Clinically validated the benefits on energy, strength, and endurance at higher 1000mg dose.

research

## Elite athlete study: Better muscle endurance and recovery in elite athletes, 4 weeks 1000mg dose.

##### 2021

research

## Landmark clinical trial showed up to 12% muscle strength improvement in older adults.

research

## Mitopure delivers 6X more Urolithin A than a 8oz of pomegranate juice in a separate clinical study.

##### 2020

product

## Launched Mitopure® — the first and only clinically tested Urolithin A supplement — in the U.S. market.

##### 2019

research

## Clinical research program launched on topical application of Mitopure for skin longevity benefits

##### 2018

research

## Discovered that the key difference between healthy, strong aging adults and those who are frail is the quality of the mitochondria in their muscles.

news

## Achieved FDA GRAS (Generally Recognized as Safe) status for Mitopure® following a rigorous, direct review by the agency—unlike the self-GRAS pathway used by most supplement companies.

##### 2015

research

## Launched the first-ever human clinical trial of Urolithin A.

##### 2012

research

## Breakthrough peer reviewed preclinical studies show Urolithin A improves mitochondrial function and muscle health.

##### 2011

product

## Developed Mitopure®, the first highly pure, bioavailable form of Urolithin A designed specifically for safe human use.

##### 2010

research

## Identified Urolithin A: a powerful postbiotic that reactivates mitophagy — the body's cellular recycling process essential for healthy aging.

##### 2009

research

## Zeroed in on natural compounds in pomegranates, but with a rigorous scientific lens to go far beyond traditional superfood claims.

##### 2008

research

## Began pioneering research on mitochondria — the energy engines of our cells — and how their decline drives aging.

##### 2007

research

## Founded by MDs and PhDs at EPFL (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology) with a mission to target aging at its root through cutting-edge science.

## Meet the minds guiding our journey toward a healthier future

We are supported by the knowledge and guidance of an accomplished group of scientific and clinical advisors with expertise spanning microbiome science, genomics, metabolomics, gastroenterology, immunology, nutrition, and human clinical research.

## Our leadership

* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/236ba0fa523887e9d85f339cc1d0b0fc7989d4ee-800x1000.png?rect=0,2,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Brian Ray

  CEO

  Brian Ray is the CEO of Timeline Longevity Inc., a company dedicated to advancing human healthspan through innovative nutritional solutions. With a passion for science-backed wellness, Brian leads the company in developing breakthrough products that promote healthy aging. With over 20 years of experience in the health and wellness industry, he combines his expertise in business strategy with a commitment to improving quality of life, driving Timeline's mission to help people live healthier, longer lives.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/4e9b3d2aa4e3e418fb2769f98fb850992e7ba77a-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Chris Rinsch, PhD

  Co-founder & President

  Chris Rinsch is co-founder and President of Timeline Longevity. For more than two decades, he has been an innovator in the life sciences arena. Before founding Timeline in 2007, Rinsch worked in venture capital investing in pioneering life sciences companies in the nutrition space and in biotechnology developing cell-based therapies at the Swiss biotech company ISOTIS SA, formerly Modex SA. Rinsch has authored original publications in leading scientific journals, including Nature Medicine, Nature Metabolism, Jama Open, Cell Reports Medicine and others, for his research on Urolithin A, mitochondrial health, muscle function, and joint health. He is also an inventor on several internationally filed and granted patents. Rinsch holds an MBA from INSEAD, France, a PhD in Cell and Molecular Biology from the University of Lausanne, a Master of Science in Biomedical Engineering from U.T. Southwestern Medical Center, and a Bachelor of Science in Engineering from Harvey Mudd College.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/af84c13b8d19f1851a696de02dafab952371bea8-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Anurag Singh

  Chief Medical Officer

  Anurag Singh is the Chief Medical Officer at Timeline, a global leader in longevity science, developing the next generation advanced nutritional and skincare products targeting improvements in mitochondrial and cellular health. With a M.D. in internal medicine and a Ph.D. in immunology, his experience includes work at top consumer health (Nestlé, Nestlé Health Science) and startups companies (Amazentis/Timeline). He’s authored >40 articles for top science journals, been awarded >15 patents and has designed and led >50 randomized clinical trials. His research over the past decade across multiple clinical trials on the postbiotic Urolithin A and its health benefits has led to the launch of multiple consumer products.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/d425838924dc5d653effcc5e5f7d83ff99bcafcf-800x1000.png?rect=0,2,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Federico Luna

  Chief Marketing Officer

  Federico Luna is the Chief Marketing Officer at Timeline, where he spearheads the company's marketing strategy and brand development. With a deep understanding of consumer behavior and a passion for health and wellness, Federico brings over 15 years of experience in building successful brands in the nutrition and lifestyle sectors. His innovative approach to marketing focuses on educating and engaging audiences about the benefits of healthy aging, helping to drive Timeline’s mission forward.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/f2373c32cdcc479738b99d0ab30e18f53ed5bcf3-2353x2940.jpg?rect=0,4,2353,2933&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Tyler Smith

  Chief Growth Officer

  Tyler Smith is the Chief Growth Officer at Timeline Longevity, where he leads consumer facing growth strategies and sales channels across DTC and Amazon. A lifelong health and wellness advocate, Tyler brings 15 years of experience in the space and more than a decade of expertise in direct-to-consumer marketing. Known for his ability to scale brands from zero to breakout success, Tyler has helped build, grow, and exit multiple companies, with past work including powerhouse brands like Hyperice, Level Home, and Klova. His approach combines data-driven strategy with creative disruption, making him part growth marketer, part team builder, and part alchemist. At Timeline, Tyler focuses on delivering healthy aging solutions at scale, ensuring that cellular vitality reaches every cart and doorstep.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/82f2db0ecf7c2bdbe356110977b108a051dd9c1a-1200x1501.png?rect=0,3,1200,1496&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Erik Schmitt

  Chief Financial Officer

  Erik Schmitt is Chief Financial Officer at Timeline Longevity. He has 30 years of experience as a Finance & Accounting professional with over 20 years of experience growing brands in the nutritional supplement category . At Timeline, Erik is committed to working with the leadership team to evolve the business from start-up to full-scale commercial leader in the Longevity supplement and skin care categories. His role as CFO is focused on building strong systems and controls to support the growth and financial performance of Timeline Longevity.

## Scientific and clinical advisors

* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/3995e79f24939d98e7437ed328d784a762511acd-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Johan Auwerx MD, PhD

  Scientific Advisor

  Professor. Johan Auwerx directs the Laboratory for Integrated and Systems Physiology at École Polytechnique Fédérale (EPFL) in Lausanne, Switzerland, where he studies the mechanisms that control how metabolisms are controlled and the factors that make them more or less effective. Focusing on longevity, his team is using multiple animal species to test a specific compound, Urolithin A, which could potentially restore much-needed muscle strength and energy to people as they age. Prof. Auwerx is a scientific advisor to Amazentis.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/5a68f6ca5fb9dc17d73409efb59d320ba2aa48e4-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Patrick Aebischer, MD

  Chairman, Scientific Advisory Board

  Professor Patrick Aebischer, chairman and co-founder of Amazentis, is a medical doctor, neuroscientist and longtime researcher. He has held distinguished positions in his home country of Switzerland, as President of the École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) and in the United States at Brown University in Providence.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/46b3649cc22bd4c1883ffa50706067d5da535291-800x1000.png?rect=0,2,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Carmen Sandi, PhD

  Scientific Advisor

  Director, Brain and Mind Institute and Professor at the EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland | Neurobehavioral science and stress related brain disorders
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/fbc30d8ccb055c79cd35b2ab9e7c82f6158b52b0-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Eric Verdin, MD

  CEO Buck Institute for Research on Aging, Scientific Advisor

  Dr. Eric M. Verdin, is a leading authority on aging research and metabolic science, has been at the helm of the Buck Institute for Research on Aging as its President and CEO since 2016. Specializing in the intricate relationship between diet, molecular biology, and age-related diseases, Dr. Verdin has contributed extensively to the field with over 210 scholarly articles and a portfolio of 15+ patents. As a professor and researcher, his work delves into understanding the proteins and molecules that influence the aging process and associated health conditions.

Prof. Auwerx is a scientific advisor to Amazentis.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/5a68f6ca5fb9dc17d73409efb59d320ba2aa48e4-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Patrick Aebischer, MD

  Chairman, Scientific Advisory Board

  Professor Patrick Aebischer, chairman and co-founder of Amazentis, is a medical doctor, neuroscientist and longtime researcher. He has held distinguished positions in his home country of Switzerland, as President of the École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne (EPFL) and in the United States at Brown University in Providence.
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/46b3649cc22bd4c1883ffa50706067d5da535291-800x1000.png?rect=0,2,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Dr. Carmen Sandi, PhD

  Scientific Advisor

  Director, Brain and Mind Institute and Professor at the EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland | Neurobehavioral science and stress related brain disorders
* ![](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/fbc30d8ccb055c79cd35b2ab9e7c82f6158b52b0-800x1000.png?rect=0,0,800,997&w=3840&h=4786&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

  ## Eric Verdin, MD

  CEO Buck Institute for Research on Aging, Scientific Advisor

  Dr. Eric M. Verdin, is a leading authority on aging research and metabolic science, has been at the helm of the Buck Institute for Research on Aging as its President and CEO since 2016. Specializing in the intricate relationship between diet, molecular biology, and age-related diseases, Dr. Verdin has contributed extensively to the field with over 210 scholarly articles and a portfolio of 15+ patents. As a professor and researcher, his work delves into understanding the proteins and molecules that influence the aging process and associated health conditions.

# Our latest financing round supported by L'Oréal and Nestlé

Timeline, a Swiss Longevity Biotech, Secures Pivotal Financing Round with Support from Strategic Global Industry Leaders, including L’Oréal and Nestlé

[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://www.timeline.com/blog/our-financing-round-supported-by-global-industry-leaders-inc-l-oreal-and-nestle)[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https://www.timeline.com/blog/our-financing-round-supported-by-global-industry-leaders-inc-l-oreal-and-nestle)[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?url=https://www.timeline.com/blog/our-financing-round-supported-by-global-industry-leaders-inc-l-oreal-and-nestle)[](mailto:?body=Here%E2%80%99s%20a%20cool%20article%20on%20the%20Timeline%20blog%20%22Our%20latest%20financing%20round%20supported%20by%20L'Or%C3%A9al%20and%20Nestl%C3%A9%22%20https://www.timeline.com/blog/our-financing-round-supported-by-global-industry-leaders-inc-l-oreal-and-nestle&subject=Hey,%20I%20thought%20you%20might%20be%20interested%20in%20this%E2%80%A6)

![Image 42: An image of the timeline team: Federico Luna, Chris Rinsch, Dr. Anurag Singh, Corinne Briaud](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/bxsu76x0/timeline-nutrition/da44a59e6d2563b23a9d83c754d237c497f23e79-2640x1760.png?w=3840&h=2560&q=80&fit=crop&auto=format)

LAUSANNE, SWITZERLAND – January 17, 2024 – Timeline, a consumer health biotech company at the forefront of developing innovative solutions for healthy aging and longevity, today announces that it raised CHF 56M (USD 66M) in an oversubscribed Series D financing round. This marks a significant milestone for the company and includes strategic investments from two global industry leaders—L’Oréal and Nestlé.

The financing round was led by BOLD (Business Opportunities for L’Oréal Development), L'Oréal Groupe’s strategic innovation venture capital fund, underscoring investors confidence in the company's proprietary technology, Mitopure®, to help people live healthier for longer. Mitopure® is backed by over 15 years of research and is clinically proven to target a key cellular longevity pathway, by recycling and renewing the powerhouses inside cells, the mitochondria. Optimal mitochondrial function is essential for maintaining cellular energy which supports muscle strength, cognition, immune resilience, skin vitality and other important benefits, offering a comprehensive approach to promoting healthspan.

> Our investment in Timeline is exciting for its potential to transpose key hallmarks of longevity onto skin health and beauty.Barbara Lavernos, Deputy Chief Executive Officer and in charge of Research, Innovation and Technology, L’Oréal

The support of these industry leaders and the funds raised will be used to build Timeline into a leading longevity consumer health brand by expanding the science, product categories, and markets across food, beauty and health sectors." This strategic collaboration reflects the breakthrough multidimensional approach that we've always believed is necessary to make meaningful advancements for longevity and healthspan." said **Patrick Aebischer, Co-Founder and Chairman of Timeline** “I want to thank L’Oréal, Nestlé and our longstanding investors for their commitment to longevity solutions rooted in the highest level of science”.

“Longevity is about living healthier for longer and L’Oréal has been working for a decade to understand and anticipate what this could mean for beauty,” said **Barbara Lavernos, Deputy Chief Executive Officer and in charge of Research, Innovation and Technology, L’Oréal**. “Longevity is a new definition of beauty, at the intersection of different scientific disciplines, from decoding biological markers to analyzing external exposure. Our investment in Timeline is exciting for its potential to transpose key hallmarks of longevity onto skin health and beauty.”

"We have been an investor in Timeline since 2019 and continue to be very impressed with the team and stand behind the exponential potential that the Mitopure technology holds for nutrition to help people age better,” said **Anna Mohl, CEO of Nestlé Health Science** “We’re excited to have L’Oréal join as an investor and strategic partner to bring this technology to new heights and extend its applications.”

## About Timeline

Timeline (parent company Amazentis) is a pioneering Swiss health science company committed to revolutionizing the longevity industry with its groundbreaking, clinically proven, proprietary ingredient Mitopure®. Offering a comprehensive approach to cellular health, Timeline incorporates the benefits of Mitopure inside its next generation nutritional supplements and topical skin health products. With more than a decade of expertise in aging science research, Timeline seeks to push the boundaries of human healthspan, contributing to a future where everyone can live longer, healthier lives. The company is backed by over 15 years of research by distinguished scientists, multiple clinical studies, over 50 patents and Nestlé Health Science has been an investor since 2019.
